description: testfire.net hosts Altoro Mutual / AltoroJ, a deliberately vulnerable demo banking web application used for security testing and training. It is maintained by HCL Software and offered online at demo.testfire.net.
summary: testfire.net exposes one known HTTP REST API surface for the AltoroJ demo app at `https://demo.testfire.net/api`, with a published OpenAPI document; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
